The Accidental Travel Club · Est. 2016

How Jack's
are you?

We've spent ten years turning sensible people into ones who book on a whim. You'd fit right in.

3.6 million members. A decade of fares too good to argue with. Now landing in North America.

10 years of places we never meant to go

The best trips were never on the bucket list.

Porto
"I only booked because the fare was ridiculous. Three years later I'd learned Portuguese."
Meg · member since 2019
Bergamo
"Booked for a weekend. Came home a week later having changed my mind about a lot of things."
Sam · member since 2021
Tbilisi
"My favourite trip ever started with a destination I genuinely couldn't pronounce."
Priya · member since 2018

You don't have to plan to become a frequent traveller. It just happens.

Join free, get the fares too good to ignore, and you could win a year of Takeoff on us.
